author: finch V.
pros: Aspirations performance meets expectations in minutes, easy to use and objective
cons: I can not say a word because I am satisfied no bug detected so far

review_title: Aspiration as a Developmental tracking tool
description: The upgrades have been great and made tracking development easier. The team is always willing to make improvements which helps us a lot. Most of all I appreciate the support team, they always respond to request for help or advice ect even going as far as doing teams calls to help or better understand what issues I'm having.
author: Jemone W.
pros: Customer support is excellent- very reachable and always willing to assist. The new reports are great and has made reporting a lot more efficient. Very easy to use and the admin portal is also easy to use.
cons: The app times out a lot. Once you in an individual's guides and you want to move back to the report for a specific period the app jumps to my guide instead of moving back to the report

description: It has been interesting journey keeping me motivated. The portal is an overview of excellence and quality development.
author: Faith C.
pros: It has covered all the areas that need attention for my career growth. Gives me an in-depth knowledge and understanding of the pillars
cons: Aspiration needs a training bucket and links attached to training. This will help clearly aligned with what is expected as the end results.

review_title: Aspiration to aspire and inspire great minds.
description: Awesome experience so far. NO complaints at all for now. Thank you to technology. I can recommend to a friend.
author: Agnes I.
pros: Weekly and monthly report visibility from plant level to department level. Everything has been simplified well.
cons: The fact that sometimes you load a new employee however they will keep experiencing errors when accessing the app until it is escalated to the aspiration team. I do not know what they do but jah.

description: its a Real good system for reporting. It just need more filters to make it easy to navigate on the system without hustle
author: Thabo T.
pros: It is simplified and all the information can be pulled from one drop down. For example pulling license to drive report for departments.
cons: Manual calculation of drumbeat per team on month versus target. It was better if we can pull the drumbeat per line in one go

review_title: Aspiration review as a knowledge base
description: Good experience, I like the system. Since I started using it, it has helped me to grow in terms of capability, knowledge allowing me to perform sustainably and take different job positions in my company
author: Wiston I.
pros: All key skills and knowledge required for specific jobs are available in aspiration, easy to use system
cons: It has been equipped with all required materials to build skills for all job positions. Simplified means of assessment by accommodating both self and line manager's assessment.

review_title: Aspiration - A great tool for tracking competency
description: My experience has been great, from data aggregation to SKAP sittings and updates has been great so far.
author: Emeka I.
pros: User friendly interface, helps you manage your team competence easily. You can easily monitor competency trend of team members over time and where improvement is needed
cons: At the moment, i am cool with the features though i think if we can have a report that lets you know what area to focus, will be a nice improvement

description: Very good, because with every session that i go to with my Line Manager, i get to get a new input on how to improve myself in my role
author: Brenda M.
pros: It has all the necessary report i require identifying. Also, the new A.I response help navigate and understand what can i learn to close Gaps and get add new skills
cons: There is nothing that i do not like about the app, because it is impactful to me also upskilling myself.

author: Phenyo S.
pros: The application is simple and easy to use. The reports generated make it simple to drive accountability
cons: For some operators, it seems to be too much as they are still struggling. They just need to assess themselves and view their score

description: User-friendly system. Good system support. Good options in terms of reporting covering different dimensions
author: Bettie P.
cons: All temps need an e-mail to register on the system, but our temps do not have access to use the system. Contributing to incorrect master data

review_title: excellent on use and very effective on benefit perspective
description: A very good management system on skills acquisition program. It gives you all you need about skills level and uplifting process
author: Nicholaus A.
pros: The display, the filters and categories on understanding the skap progress. the way the process works, the feedback. direct link with emails, giving you possibility to send feedback direct to the asessee
cons: The averaging of skap score from my team. A very good employee feedback and giving possibility to send email to employee. The self-scoring is also awesome

description: good simple yet powerful . employees can track their own progress do their own ratings and attach evidence
author: Cyril D.
pros: easy to use. can track employees progress. pulling of graphs are good. the fact that evidence can be attached
cons: only thing is i cannot pull a graph for my entire team as my team forms part of a bigger team. i could do it before now it seems that i cannot

description: Fine, helps around knowledge improvement and also very easy when adding new joiners to the aspiration portal.
author: Emeka N.
pros: Good report and progress tracking... Easily accessed when looking for Learning objectives to give to people.
cons: No room for immediate review to soothe current situations or add extra value adding Learning Objectives (Generic)

description: My overall experience has been so great especially the simplified loading and terminating of guides. Generally, the use of the tool is superb.
author: Nabwire B.
pros: I like how easy it is to navigate through reports especially on each employee. The progress per every period.
cons: I don't think there's anything I would want changed in that regard. So far all is well and I am happy.

description: My overall experience using the platform has been great. the update from the older systems and the centralization of data from all the countries we work with has been helpful.
author: Nelson M.
pros: The platform is easy to use with regards to progress tracking, it is easy to load a new employee and navigate the system.
cons: The cons of using aspiration is how the reports download. I think the update to how the report was downloading was easier, the new downloaded reports are not conducive for our reports.

description: EDUCATIVE, ENGAGING AND PRACTICAL FOR THE VARIOUS JOB ROUTINES. USER FRIENDLY AND VALUE FOR MONEY. HELP IDENTIFY TRAINING NEEDS
author: VICTORIA K.
pros: USER FRIENDLY, PROGRESSIVE TRACKING OF EMPLOYEE PERFORMANCE AND VALUE FOR MONEY. HELP IDENTIFY TRAINING NEEDS.
cons: IT IS TIME CONSUMING AND SITUATIONS WHERE YOU HAVE COMBINED OPERATIONS LIKE GHANA (T1 & T2). SCHEDULING DRIVERS FOR ENGAGEMENT IS SOMETIMES DIFFICULT
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: My overall experience was not bad, i can say my experience was fair though there are a few things i would love to see improve
author: Abraham C.
pros: It gave me an opportunity to express my views about the organisation, atleast i was able to express myself
cons: It did not give us options to give a detailed explanation in our answers to the questions we were asked

review_title: Easy to use and relevant to our work environment.
description: The system has enabled us to drive performance management to all levels of people in our organisation. It has also been beneficial for our increase and bonus process.
author: Nomvula P.
pros: Simple and not complicated. Even your most junior staff can use it with ease. Historic data is kept. Offers a full suit talent management bouquet, performance management, training and succession planning.
cons: Minor glitches which were later resolved with ease. Great support from the system developers. Aspiration has been streamlined to suit our needs, developer is easily accessible, cares about the system, tends to our needs with urgency and professionalism. Complies to deadlines all the time.

review_title: Aspirations is a great tool to monitor and manage the capability of our Sales Force.
description: Valuable information on the capability gaps within our Sales force enabling us to channel funds and resources into the correct training
author: Bruce W.
pros: The assessment's are easy to conduct and the scores easy to report on. The software allows us to identify the capability gaps within our Sales Force. This valuable information is used when we develop our training plan for the year. It is user friendly and provides valuable information if used correctly. The information on the software is only as good as the quality of the assessment's conducted by the managers.

review_title: i have been working with Aspiration since 5 year its a good tools
author: candida D.
pros: helpeful , Easy to work , quicky and can find the CG for we need for the busines , pull the report for the past years, and the employees can became competente in their job and help what they need to do to where they can find the guide for to close the gaps to become competente on theirs expecific positions.
cons: Limited level of departments , cannot only create one more level to specify the other level Ex: only have L1 or 2 see the progress of line 1 or 2 need open more level 5

review_title: It has been a very useful tool providing both learning, guidance and competence to employees.
description: Enhancing employees competence and thus good performance
author: Gasper T.
pros: Enhances performance through self learning. It is also easy to manage learning and raise competence of staff and thus enhances individual development. Sometimes I wonder what led Brian to come up with this excellent tool. I believe if more awareness is brought to other Company's in Tanzania and elsewhere, they would love to use it. It makes one understand what he is expected of him/her through the learning objectives. A very useful tool indeed.
cons: Absence of user's guide/self learning material for new staff. I would suggest that one is made available. Otherwise Aspiration / CAP is an excellent tool.

description: We are using it for our Operations Academy where each job title has objectives attached to it which each employee is expected to know. When an employee is not yet competent, aspiration shows us the list of those employees and relevant interventions can be done to develop individual development program to close the performance gap.
author: Lucky S.
pros: The ability to extract reports at any time and view progress.
cons: It is sometimes difficult to access some of the information - you need to search under various headings in order do an assessment on an employee. This link must not be hidden, it must be put in a place where every user can easily find it.

author: Shiniesh S.
pros: The fact i get cash back every month i spend. They have fast and amazing customer service!!
cons: The fact you have to wait 8 weeks to get your referral credit i feel it should be instant when they deposit the $10.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: My experience with Aspirations is very positive. As you can keep record of your team or organisation's performance and competencies at a click of a button and you don't have to be a rocket scientist to do so.
author: Chantal S.
pros: The software is user-friendly and also easy on the eye. The different categories, for employees, managers and executive summaries guides the individual to exactly where he/she needs to be. The graphs are also a big help as it give you an overview of exactly what the progress is.
cons: The only thing that could be reviewed is the information pulling through the categories could be quicker, for example, when I log on as a manager the %competency might be 63%, but as soon as an executive logs on the %competency might still be at 60%...… which the needs to be explained.

description: Aspiration system improves performance review rate as it is convenient for managers who do the review.
author: Mesfin A.
pros: -Very Simple -Very Convenient - Elegant Design -good graphics and resolution
cons: - got stack -slow - do not instantly update when review is done
